info.title: Microsoft Power Platform REST API - powerpages
info.description: Unified API for all administrative capabilities in Microsoft Power Platform.

get.description: Get a list of all the websites in your environment.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: The number of items to skip before returning the remaining items.

post.description: Trigger the creation of a new website.

get.summary: Get the Power Pages website details by specifying its unique identifier (ID).
get.description: Get website details using a specified website ID.

delete.description: Trigger the deletion of a website by specifying the website ID.

post.summary: Upload a certificate for a website.
post.description: Validates and uploads an SSL or managed certificate for the specified website. The certificate file and password must be provided as multipart form data.

parameters.name: certType
parameters.description: The type of certificate (e.g., SSL, MANAGED).

schema.description: The thumbprint of the uploaded certificate.

get.summary: Get certificates associated with a website.
get.description: Returns the list of certificates associated with the specified website, filtered by certificate type.

parameters.name: certType
parameters.description: The type of certificate to retrieve. Allowed values: SSL, MANAGED.

delete.summary: Delete a certificate associated with a website.
delete.description: Deletes the certificate identified by the given thumbprint and type from the website.

parameters.name: thumbprint
parameters.description: The thumbprint of the certificate to delete.

parameters.name: certType
parameters.description: The type of certificate (e.g., SSL, MANAGED).

post.summary: Convert a trial Power Pages website to production.
post.description: Convert a trial website to a production website.

put.summary: Create web application Firewall rules on a Power Pages website.
put.description: Create web application Firewall rules on the given website.

get.summary: List custom host names for a website.
get.description: Returns the list of custom host names configured for the specified website.

items.description: A custom host name configured for the website.

post.summary: Add a custom domain to a website.
post.description: Adds the specified custom host name to the website.

parameters.name: customDomain
parameters.description: The custom host name to add to the website.

delete.summary: Delete a custom domain from a website.
delete.description: Removes the specified custom host name from the website and cleans up associated SSL bindings and Azure Front Door (AFD) configuration.

parameters.name: hostName
parameters.description: The custom host name to remove from the website.

put.summary: Deletes web application firewall custom rules on a Power Pages website.
put.description: Deletes web application firewall custom rules on the given website.

post.summary: Disable web application Firewall on a Power Pages website.
post.description: Disable web application Firewall on the given website.

post.summary: Enable web application firewall on a Power Pages website.
post.description: Enable web application firewall on the given website.

get.summary: Get the web application firewall rules.
get.description: Get the web application firewall rules associated with the given website.

parameters.name: ruleType
parameters.description: Type of web application firewall rules to retrieve.

get.summary: Get the web application firewall status.
get.description: Get the status of web application firewall associated with the given website.

get.summary: Get allowed IP addresses for a Power Pages website.
get.description: Returns the list of IP addresses in the website's IP restriction allow list.

post.summary: Add allowed IP addresses on a Power Pages website.
post.description: These IP addresses will be able to access the website.

post.summary: Remove allowed IP addresses from a Power Pages website.
post.description: Removes the specified IP addresses from the website's IP restriction allow list.
Restart the website for the given site ID.

get.summary: Get deep scan report for a Power Pages website.
get.description: Get the deep scan report for a Power Pages website.

get.summary: Get deep scan score for a Power Pages website.
get.description: Get the deep scan score for a Power Pages website.

post.summary: Start deep scan for a Power Pages website.
post.description: Start deep scan for a Power Pages website.

post.summary: Execute quick scan for a Power Pages website.
post.description: Execute a quick scan for a Power Pages website.

parameters.name: lcid
parameters.description: Language code identifier (LCID) for the website.

patch.summary: Stamp bootstrap version five (5) status as enabled for website.
patch.description: Stamp bootstrap version five (5) status as enabled for website.

post.summary: Stamp data model version for website.
post.description: Stamp data model version for website.

get.summary: List SSL bindings for a website by hostname.
get.description: Returns the SSL bindings (certificate thumbprints) associated with the specified hostname on the website.

parameters.name: hostName
parameters.description: The custom domain hostname to filter SSL bindings by.

post.summary: Add an SSL binding to a website.
post.description: Binds the specified certificate thumbprint to the custom domain hostname of the website.

parameters.name: thumbprint
parameters.description: The thumbprint of the certificate to bind.

parameters.name: hostName
parameters.description: The custom domain hostname to bind the certificate to.

delete.summary: Delete SSL binding for a website by certificate thumbprint.
delete.description: Removes the SSL binding for the specified hostname and certificate thumbprint from the website.

parameters.name: hostName
parameters.description: The custom domain hostname whose SSL binding will be removed.

parameters.name: thumbprint
parameters.description: The thumbprint of the certificate to unbind.

post.description: Start the website for the given site ID.
Stop the website for the given site ID.

post.summary: Toggle AFD traffic routing for a Power Pages website.
post.description: Toggles traffic routing between Azure Front Door and web apps for a portal. When enableAFD is true, enables the AFD endpoint and adds service tag restrictions to web apps. When false, removes service tags and disables the AFD endpoint.

parameters.name: enableAFD
parameters.description: True to enable AFD routing, false to disable.

post.summary: Update security group for site visibility for a website.
post.description: Update the security group for site visibility for a website.

post.summary: Update site visibility for a website.
post.description: Update site visibility for a website.

websiteRecordId.description: Dataverse record unique identifier (ID) of the website

EnableCDN.description: Enable Content Delivery Network (CDN) for the website

EnableWAF.description: Enable Web Application Firewall (WAF) for the website

UseDynamics365PortalAddOnLicense.description: Use Dynamics 365 Portal Add-On License for the website

message.description: Result message describing the outcome of the toggle operation.

createdOn.description: Website creation time in the ISO 8601 UTC format

tenantId.description: Tenant unique identifier (ID) of the website

environmentId.description: Environment unique identifier (ID) of the website

dataverseOrganizationId.description: Organization unique identifier (ID) of the website

customHostNames.description: Custom hostnames added for the website

websiteRecordId.description: Dataverse record unique identifier (ID) of the website

packageInstallStatus.description: Package installation status of the website

trialExpiringInDays.description: Time (in days) to expiration of the website

suspendedWebsiteDeletingInDays.description: Time (in days) to website deletion, if suspended

applicationUserAadAppId.description: Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory) object unique identifier (ID)

ownerId.description: User unique identifier (ID) of the website owner

dataModelVersionValue.description: value of data model version for IsNewDataModel

WafRuleAction.description: Action to take for the rule

IpAddressType.description: The type of the IP address

rateLimitDurationInMinutes.description: Duration in minutes for rate limiting

action.description: Action to take when the rule matches

RuleSetType.description: Type of the managed rule set

RuleSetVersion.description: Version of the managed rule set

RuleSetAction.description: Action to take for the rule set

Exclusions.description: List of exclusions for the rule set
List of exclusions for the rule group
List of exclusions for the rule

id.description: Unique identifier of the managed rule set

name.description: Name of the managed rule set

provisioningState.description: Provisioning state of the managed rule set

ruleSetId.description: Unique identifier of the rule set

IpAddressEntity.description: Represents an IP address entry in the allow list

IpAddress.description: The IP address or CIDR range (e.g., "208.130.0.0/16")

result.description: The result of the issue check

learnMoreUrl.description: URL for more information about the issue

UserName.description: Name of the user who initiated the scan

Rules.description: List of rules evaluated during the scan

AlertsCount.description: Number of alerts generated by the rule

Alerts.description: List of alerts generated by the rule

Risk.description: Risk level associated with the alert

RuleId.description: Identifier of the rule that generated the alert

LearnMoreLink.description: Links to learn more about the alert

Name.description: The custom hostname the SSL binding is associated with.

Thumbprint.description: The certificate thumbprint bound to the hostname.

SubjectName.description: The subject name of the certificate.

ExpirationDate.description: The expiration date of the certificate.

Location.description: The Azure region where the certificate is stored.

Type.description: The type of the certificate (e.g., SSL, MANAGED, AZURE_MANAGED).
